content.stem: Which one belongs to a different category: apple, banana, carrot, orange, grape?
content.explanation: Apple, banana, orange, and grape are all fruits, while carrot is a vegetable. Carrot belongs to a different category than the fruit group.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Students may think apple doesn't belong because it's the only red one
Students may think banana doesn't belong because of its unique curved shape
Students may think orange doesn't belong due to its round shape compared to others
Students may think grape doesn't belong due to personal preference or familiarity rather than logical categorization
